metadata.description: Navigate to Pulp Fiction (1994) on IMDb, open the 'Add to list' panel via the watchlist dropdown, select an existing custom list — verifying the AddConstToList mutation fires.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction:
On IMDb, open the title page for 'Pulp Fiction' (1994), click the dropdown chevron next to the Watchlist button, and add it to an existing custom list of yours.

Note: The user must already have at least one custom list created. If not, create one first.
